protein_name: Belongs to the eukaryotic ribosomal protein eS27 family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cytosol; cytosolic small ribosomal subunit; endoplasmic reticulum; nucleolus; nucleus; ribonucleoprotein complex; ribosome
raw_fields.Molecular Function: metal ion binding; protein binding; structural constituent of ribosome; translation activator activity; zinc ion binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: DNA damage response, signal transduction by p53 class mediator; intrinsic apoptotic signaling pathway in response to DNA damage by p53 class mediator; mitotic G1 DNA damage checkpoint signaling; positive regulation of translation; rRNA processing; translation
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: 40S ribosomal protein S27-like; Ribosomal protein eS27-like; ribosomal protein S27 like; ribosomal protein S27-like; RPS27L; RS27L; Small ribosomal subunit protein eS27-like
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 9.57 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
